news.t: First Trust Launches First Trust Indxx Metaverse ETF

holdings.infoBox: ARVR is an equity ETF with a total of 44 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 6.57%, Advanced Micro Devices at 5.89%, STMicroelectronics at 5.28%, Intel at 5.28%, and QUALCOMM at 4.40%.

overview.description: The First Trust Indxx Metaverse ETF (ARVR) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Indxx Metaverse index. The fund tracks a modified equal-weighted index of stocks, spanning a broad range of industries globally, that are involved in business activities associated with the Metaverse. ARVR was launched on Apr 19, 2022 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: First Trust Launches First Trust Indxx Metaverse ETF
data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. (“First Trust”), a leading exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) provider and asset manager, announced today that it has launched a new ETF, the First ...
